Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Cindy Lee, Esq. for the Plaintiff McCormick Properties LLC, a Limited Liability Co, represented by agent: Tom McCormick.
Emily Fedman, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Sheila Amerson.
The Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305-B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed settlement agreement, " Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
Trial Date vacated.
